text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is a real work, but it is colloquially referred to by slightly different names (e.g., "MACE-OFF23") in the literature and by the authors themselves in some datasets, which caused the metadata mismatches detected by the checkers. The actual paper title is "MACE-OFF: Transferable Short Range Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules," and the cited authors substantially match the full author list of the paper found at the arXiv URL.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.15211
FOUND_TITLE: MACE-OFF: Transferable Short Range Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules
FOUND_AUTHORS: Dávid Péter Kovács, J. Harry Moore, Nicholas J. Browning, Ilyes Batatia, Joshua T. Horton, Yixuan Pu, Venkat Kapil, William C. Witt, Ioan-Bogdan Magdău, Daniel J. Cole, Gábor Csányi
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
